_description: Script registry and pipeline documentation. Claude MUST check this before doing any enrichment/catalog work manually. Humans: this is the single source of truth for all automation pipelines.

full_enrichment_pipeline._doc: Complete product enrichment flow from raw Excel to InSales-ready export. Follow stages in order. NEVER skip to AI (Stage 2) without exhausting local (Stage 1).

stages.name: Source Import
scripts: catalog_import.py
stages.extracts: PN, name, our_price_raw, quantity, brand, expected_category → content.seed_name

stages.name: Local Enrichment (no AI, no external API)
scripts: evidence_contract_hardening_v1.py — subbrand detection, training_urls, price_contract
identity_checker.py boost — verify/upgrade identity_level from existing data
confidence_recalculator.py --apply — recalculate confidence from all signals
stages.note: pn_variants.py, category_resolver.py, spec_extractor.py are libraries called from photo_pipeline, not standalone batch scripts

stages.name: Local Enrichment (needs SerpAPI key)
scripts: photo_pipeline.py — SerpAPI photo search + JSON-LD price extraction + specs
datasheet_pipeline.py — SerpAPI PDF search + extraction

stages.name: AI Deep Research
scripts: dr_prompt_generator.py — generate prompts for SKUs with gaps
(owner runs Gemini/Claude DR manually) — produces .md files
dr_results_import.py — parse .md → result_*.json + training JSONL
merge_research_to_evidence.py — merge DR results into evidence
stages.note: DR is heavy/slow/expensive. Verify ALL local sources exhausted first.

stages.name: Document & Asset Collection
scripts: download_documents.py — download PDFs/datasheets from DR results
photo_matcher.py --apply — quality gate: promote KEEP → ACCEPT
(cloud upload — needs owner setup) — photos + datasheets to cloud storage

stages.name: Price & Quality
scripts: price_unit_judge_full_run.py — per_unit vs per_pack disambiguation
gemini_price_scout.py — AI price lookup for missing prices (Gemini API)

stages.name: Normalization & Export
scripts: evidence_normalize.py — unify all data into normalized{} block
export_ready.py — calculate readiness: EXPORT_READY / DRAFT / BLOCKED
evidence_coverage_report.py — audit field completeness
export_pipeline.py — final export to CSV/Excel for InSales

stages.name: Batch Lifecycle
scripts: evidence_lifecycle.py status — pre-archive check
evidence_lifecycle.py archive --tag TAG — archive + clean
evidence_lifecycle.py restore BATCH_ID — restore if needed
stages.note: After archive → back to Stage 0 with next Excel

training_data_collected: training_urls[] — distributor/seller URLs per product (in evidence)
dr_sources[] — source metadata: type, has_price, has_specs, has_photo
training_data/*.jsonl — URL training, identity examples, price extraction examples

catalog_import.purpose: R1.1 Import Pipeline: Excel/CSV → stg_catalog_imports records
catalog_import.critical_rule: PN and brand normalized to UPPER before dedup. Confidence gate routes to accepted/review_required/rejected.

dr_prompt_generator.purpose: Generate Gemini Deep Research prompts from evidence data
evidence_fields_used: our_price_raw (reference price RUB — passed to DR)
evidence_fields_NOT_used: expected_category (UNRELIABLE — known wrong for many items)
dr_prompt_generator.critical_rule: Hints from assembled_title + seed_name from Excel. Reference price from our_price_raw. NEVER expected_category.

dr_results_import.purpose: Import Gemini DR markdown results into structured JSON
dr_results_import.critical_rule: Handles v1 (Russian), v2 (English), v3 (English+) prompt formats automatically

merge_research_to_evidence.purpose: Merge DR results into evidence bundles

download_documents.purpose: Download PDFs, datasheets, and images referenced in evidence

export_pipeline.purpose: Export enriched catalog to CSV/Excel for InSales import

confidence_recalculator.purpose: R1.2 Recalculate evidence confidence labels from current signals (identity, photo, price)

photo_matcher.purpose: R1.4 Photo quality gate: validate KEEP photos, promote to ACCEPT, generate re-search queue

photo_pipeline.purpose: Photo search, download, and quality validation

research_runner.purpose: Automated research execution with multiple providers

category_resolver.purpose: Map products to InSales category tree

card_status.purpose: Calculate readiness status for each product card

evidence_lifecycle.purpose: Batch lifecycle: status / archive / list / restore. Manages accumulate → normalize → archive → next batch cycle.
evidence_lifecycle.usage: python scripts/evidence_lifecycle.py status | archive --tag TAG | list | restore BATCH_ID

evidence_normalize.purpose: Normalization layer: unify 3-pipeline data into canonical normalized{} block. Auto-called by merge_research, photo_matcher, confidence_recalculator, price_unit_judge after evidence writes.
